summary: INVENTORY SYNC ENGINE (MEGA PROMPT #37) - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 28/28 pytest tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified and interactive features working. Fast cached search (<2ms latency from MongoDB). Drift severity classification (normal/warning/high/critical) working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: inventory_sync_service.py: Architecture correctly implements Supplier → MongoDB → Redis Cache → Search Engine pattern
inventory_sync_service.py: search_inventory() properly falls back to MongoDB when Redis unavailable (~1.4-2ms latency confirmed)
inventory_sync_service.py: revalidate_price() correctly calculates drift_severity: normal (0-2%), warning (2-5%), high (5-10%), critical (10%+)
inventory_sync_service.py: trigger_supplier_sync() runs in SIMULATION mode generating realistic hotel data
inventory_sync_router.py: All 6 endpoints properly protected with require_roles(['super_admin', 'admin'])
InventorySyncDashboardPage.jsx: All data-testid attributes present for testing (kpi-hotels, supplier-row-*, search-input, etc.)
InventorySyncDashboardPage.jsx: Turkish language UI correctly implemented (Supplier Sync Durumu, Son Fiyat Revalidasyonlari, etc.)
adminNav.js: 'Inventory Sync Engine' link properly placed under PILOT OPERASYON section at /app/admin/inventory-sync
MOCKED: Entire inventory sync operates in SIMULATION mode - supplier data is generated, not from real APIs. Redis cache unavailable (uses MongoDB fallback). This is correct per CTO design.
seed_data_creation: Sync triggers generate simulated hotel inventory for ratehawk/paximum/wwtatil suppliers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inventory Sync Engine fully tested. Key endpoints: GET/POST /api/inventory/sync/trigger (trigger sync), GET /api/inventory/sync/status (all 4 suppliers), GET /api/inventory/sync/jobs (job history), GET /api/inventory/search?destination=X&min_stars=N (cached search), GET /api/inventory/stats (comprehensive stats with city breakdown), POST /api/inventory/revalidate (price drift with severity). Frontend at /app/admin/inventory-sync shows KPI cards (6), supplier table (4 suppliers), cached search, city breakdown, revalidation history with severity badges (High/Warning/Normal), sync job history, and architecture info panel. TBO supplier is in 'pending' status and cannot be synced from UI. Redis is unavailable so search uses MongoDB fallback (confirmed ~1.4-2ms latency).

backend_apis.POST /api/inventory/sync/trigger ratehaw: PASS - Returns job_id, status=completed, records_updated, prices_updated, availability_updated
backend_apis.POST /api/inventory/sync/trigger unknown: PASS - Returns error for unknown supplier
backend_apis.GET /api/inventory/sync/status: PASS - Returns all 4 suppliers with config, last_sync, inventory counts
backend_apis.GET /api/inventory/sync/jobs: PASS - Returns job history with supplier filter support
backend_apis.GET /api/inventory/search?destination=An: PASS - Returns results from mongodb, latency <2ms
backend_apis.GET /api/inventory/stats: PASS - Returns totals, by_supplier, by_city, redis_cache status, recent_revalidations, sync_config
backend_apis.POST /api/inventory/revalidate: PASS - Returns cached_price, revalidated_price, diff_amount, diff_pct, drift_direction, drift_severity
backend_apis.Auth protection: PASS - All endpoints return 401 without auth

frontend_ui.KPI cards: PASS - Toplam Otel, Fiyat Kaydi, Musaitlik, Search Index, Sync Jobs, Redis Cache (6 cards)
frontend_ui.Supplier Sync Status table: PASS - 4 rows (ratehawk, paximum, wwtatil, tbo) with Completed/Never badges
frontend_ui.Cached Search panel: PASS - Input + Ara button, shows results with Kaynak: mongodb, Latency: Xms
frontend_ui.Search results table: PASS - Supplier, Otel, Sehir, Yildiz, Fiyat, Musait columns
frontend_ui.City breakdown table: PASS - Sehir, Otel count, Ort. Fiyat
frontend_ui.Son Fiyat Revalidasyonlari table: PASS - Supplier, Cache, Reval, Diff, Severity with color-coded badges
frontend_ui.Severity badges: PASS - High (red), Warning (orange outline), Normal (green outline)
frontend_ui.Sync Job Gecmisi table: PASS - Shows job history with status, counts, duration
frontend_ui.Mimari Bilgi panel: PASS - Search Flow, Booking Flow, Sync Flow descriptions
frontend_ui.Refresh button: PASS - Yenile button refreshes all data
frontend_ui.Navigation link: PASS - 'Inventory Sync Engine' in sidebar under PILOT OPERASYON

mocked_apis.simulation_mode: MOCKED - All inventory sync operates in SIMULATION mode. Hotel data is generated/simulated, not from real supplier APIs.
mocked_apis.redis_cache: MOCKED/UNAVAILABLE - Redis cache is not available in this environment. Search falls back to MongoDB (confirmed working with ~1.4-2ms latency).
mocked_apis.price_revalidation: MOCKED - Revalidation simulates price drift based on supplier reliability profiles (ratehawk: -2% to +5%, paximum: -3% to +8%, wwtatil: -5% to +12%)
